subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath come before Us, and We have hearkened unto that which thou didst call upon God, both in thy public utterance and thy private communion. Verily, thy Lord [3.5s]... ...Praise be to Thee, O Lord my God! I am the one who hath sought the good pleasure of Thy will
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر بین یدینا کتابک و سمعنا ما نادیت به الله فی جهرک و نجویک ان ربک... سبحانک اللّهمّ یا الهی انا الّذی اردت رضائک
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @prayer for nearness to God, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
